name: Prison Cell Key
description: Various runes and etchings cover the surface of the key.

name: Key to the City
description: Master Key to the City of Stratholme

name: The Eye of Haramad
description: A skeleton key that will open Nexus-Prince Shaffar's personal stasis chamber.

name: Key of Shadows
description: The teeth of this key curl into wisps of void.

name: Tap Tool
description: A Brewmaster's tool for unlocking particularly hardy keg taps.

name: Ancient Mogu Key
description: Covered in rust.

name: Key to the Palace of Lei Shen
description: An ancient key to a secret entrance in the Thunder King's Citadel. The Shado-Pan would be interested in this.

name: Gatekeeper's Orb
description: Crackles with energy.

name: Kor'kron Cage Key
description: Unlocks a Kor'kron cage in the Valley of Strength.

name: Barnacle Encrusted Key
description: A small key with skull and crossbones affixed the top, covered in barnacles.

name: Mist-Filled Spirit Lantern
description: A strange, lifelike mist is trapped within this small lantern.

name: Goldmane's Cage Key
description: This key seems similar in construction to the cage on top of the tower at Ironfist Harbor.

name: Goldtoe's Key
description: A rusty key pilfered from a cantankerous pirate bird.

name: An Old Key
description: This key was found near the abandoned mine in Admiral Taylor's garrison. It has no distinguishing marks.

name: Stormshield Prison Key
description: Used to hold Horde prisoners at Stormshield Stronghold. The Jail Guard back at Warspear Outpost may know more.

name: Warspear Prison Key
description: Used to hold Alliance prisoners at Warspear Outpost. The Jail Guard back at Stormshield Stronghold may know more.

name: Mornath's Key
description: This key is shaped like a crashing wave.

name: Cage Key
description: Opens a cage on this island

name: Ashvane Skeleton Key
description: A complicated skeleton key.

name: Merchant's Key
description: Stolen off of some poor soul by a hungry raven.

name: Holographic Combat Entity Data
description: #WARNING 2.1.7 - B: Contains data for a challenging combat training simulation. Install at your own risk.

name: Exothermic Evaporator Coil
description: An experimental heat exchange device. Corrodes quickly when detached from a power source.

name: Holographic Combat Entity Data
description: #WARNING 2.1.7 - B: Contains data for a challenging combat training simulation. Install at your own risk.

name: Old Rusty Key
description: A key to an old rusty chest.

name: Key of Bound Earth
description: An unusual Primordial Key.

name: Mechanized Supply Key
description: Key to a Mechanized Supply Chest.

name: Torghast Door Key
description: Opens a door on this floor of Torghast.

name: Blackthorn Antidote
description: It tastes three times worse than it smells.

name: Atonement Crypt Key
description: Covered in rust.

name: Toc's Key
description: Unlocks prisoner cage containing Ansid.

name: Construct Supply Key
description: Key to Construct Supply Chest at the Spearhead.

name: Ring of Keys
description: A small ring of keys, clearly for the various prison doors around the crypt.

name: Loose Stitch's Key
description: Unlocks prisoner cage containing Salgin.

name: Scorched Crypt Key
description: Can be used to open the crypt door in the Scorched Crypt.

name: Afflictor's Key
description: Etched with runes matching those on the locks that bind Anduin in the Tremaculum.

name: Slim Shinbone
description: A thin bone used to pry open crates or locked chests!

name: House Grinchin Ring
description: Magical protections prevent those outside House Grinchin from holding it for long.

name: Romance Novel
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Historical Treatise
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Joke Book
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Mortal Recipe Book
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Sinstone Archival Records
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Gubbins's Lost Diary
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Murder Mystery
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Game Rulebook
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Horror Novel
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Self-Help Book
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Tubbins's Autobiography
description: Well-worn and falling apart.

name: Locked Toolbox Key
description: Key to the Locked Toolbox at the Spearhead.

name: Battlefront Ration Key
description: Key to the Battlefront Rations at the Spearhead.

name: Empty Plague Bottle
description: One of the House of Plagues' chemists must have left this lying around. Someone could potentially fill it with anything. How unsafe!

name: Faldo's Key
description: Key to the Faldo's Keepsakes chest.

name: Missing Ritual Pages
description: These pages look ripped out of a necromancer's spellbook from the House of Rituals.

name: Emergency Supplies Key
description: Key to the Emergency Supplies chest.

name: Etherwyrm Cage Key
description: Key to the Etherwyrm Cage

name: Seal Breaker Key
description: A key to break any Domination Seal.

name: Small Offering Key
description: An ornate key meant to unlock the offering boxes used in various Korthian rituals.

name: Provis Cache Key
description: Key to the Locked Provis Cache in Provis Flora.

name: Dominance Key
description: A key to the Domination Cache near the Dread Portal.

name: Spatial Opener
description: A strangely perfect shimmering geometric form. This looks important.

name: Sandworn Chest Key
description: Key to the Locked Sandworn Chest in Endless Sands, Zereth Mortis

name: Scrimshaw Key
description: Delicately hewn from procelain bone. Conspicously slimey.

name: Fullsails Supply Chest Key
description: The lost key to the Fullsails Supply Chest at the Obsidian Bulwark.

name: Snail Food
description: Mushy and stinky in equal measure.

name: Earthen Charm
description: Allows the activation of Earthen Wards around the Obsidian Citadel.

name: Everliving Wooden Key
description: The base of this key regrows any damage done to it.

name: Lost Obsidian Cache Key
description: The key to the Lost Obsidian Cache.

name: Decryption Key
description: This is the missing information needed to decipher a Curious Glyph.

name: Scorching Key
description: Heated by the corebeast's body. Almost too hot to hold!

name: Waterlogged Key
description: A wet and slimy key.

name: Everburning Key
description: One of several keys required to open a Secured Shipment. Trusted only to Igira's finest blacksmiths, these keys are consumed upon their use.

name: Research Chest Key
description: A key to a locked chest within the Zskera Vaults.

name: Glowing Key
description: Emanates a soft arcane glow.

name: Frostfire Key
description: Scorching hot, but somehow covered in a fine layer of ice.

name: Faded Supply Chest Key
description: The lost key to a supply chest at the Faded Shore.

name: Clammer's Pry Bar
description: Well used, has opened many clams fused shut by coral.

name: Cache Key
description: A key lost in the Unseeming.

name: Spare Key to Shaffar's Stasis Chamber
First Mate Dat-Dat's Key
description: Key to Dat-Dat's private stash of reading material.

name: Submerged Bottle
description: An old bottle, tightly corked. There is a rolled up scroll inside.

name: Jeweled Key
description: Mundane, yet somehow still ominous.

name: Key of Fused Darkness
description: A mysterious key whose properties defy all logic.

name: Bear Tooth
description: Token of Nalorakk's Chosen. Key to the Honored Warrior's Cache.

name: Dragonhawk Feather
description: Token of Jan'alai's Chosen. Key to the Honored Warrior's Cache.

name: Eagle Talon
description: Token of Akil'zon's Chosen. Key to the Honored Warrior's Cache.

name: Lynx Claw
description: Token of Halazzi's Chosen. Key to the Honored Warrior's Cache.
